patents.title: US20240123456A1 Structured research workflow evidence fixture
patents.abstract: Fixture patent-like source stores bounded claim elements for follow-up comparison.
independentClaimSnippets: Claim-like workflow elements should be mapped against candidate feature rows.
Decompose claim-like elements into overlap and differentiator checks.

claimElements.text: Claim-like workflow elements should be mapped against candidate feature rows.
Decompose claim-like elements into overlap and differentiator checks.

limitations: Fixture reading is deterministic and bounded; human review is still required.
Patent-like fixture is not legal claim construction.

It does not describe Sovryn's open invention dossier, source-card index hash, replay gate, and curated dry-run publication package. Compare against Sovryn factory source cards, claim matrix, prototype execution, and gated dry-run publication.
Patent claim elements are research cues only and require human/legal review.
